docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT FIRST DATABANK, INC'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR (TO BE RESET IN DEPT. 304)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-21-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR COORDINATED WITH JCCP 4631. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PRODUCTS LIABILITY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRECH, VICTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MCKESSON CORPORATION, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA NORTHSTAR RX LLC, A DELAWARE CORPORATION FIRST DATA BANK, A MISSOURI CORPORATION WYETH PHARMACEUTICALS INC., INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA ESI  LEDERLE, INC. THIS CASE IS DEEMED AN INCLUDED ACTION IN THE REGLAN/METOCLOPRAMIDE CASES, JCCP 4631, PURSUANT TO ORDER DESIGNATING POTENTIAL ADD-ON CASES AS INCLUDED CASES, DATED OCT-14-2010
JOINT STIPULATION TO WITHDRAWAL SPECIAL MTN TO STRIKE UNDER THE ANTI SLAPP STATUE AND TO DISMISS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFT FIRST DATABANK ONLY FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRECH, VICTOR
NOT REPORTED. COMPLEX LITIGATION HEARING RE MOTION TO STRIKE SET FOR DEC-23-2010, IN DEPT. 304, IS OFF CALENDAR AT THE MOVING PARTY'S REQUEST. JUDGE RICHARD A. KRAMER; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; DEPT. 304.
